Index

All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Serialized Form

A

A1 - Variable in class SharedVariables
Result of FuncA1: sum from 0 to 500.
A2 - Variable in class SharedVariables
Result of FuncA2: B2 + sum from 0 to 300.
A3 - Variable in class SharedVariables
Result of FuncA3: B3 + sum from 0 to 400.

B

B1 - Variable in class SharedVariables
Result of FuncB1: sum from 0 to 250.
B2 - Variable in class SharedVariables
Result of FuncB2: A1 + sum from 0 to 200.
B3 - Variable in class SharedVariables
Result of FuncB3: A2 + sum from 0 to 400.

D

DroneController - Class in Unnamed Package
DroneController handles Triple Modular Redundancy (TMR) majority voting, reliability checking, fallback mechanisms, and triggers safe mode actions.
DroneController(int, LoggerUtility) - Constructor for class DroneController
Initializes the controller with a default baseline altitude.

E

Expected Final Values (computed analytically): - Search tag in class SyncMain
Section

G

getAltitude() - Method in class DroneController
Gets the previous valid altitude.
getSensorId() - Method in class Sensor
Gets the sensor identifier.

L

log(String, String) - Method in class LoggerUtility
Logs an event to the log file and prints to the standard console.
LoggerUtility - Class in Unnamed Package
Handles logging of events to both the log file and the console.
LoggerUtility(String) - Constructor for class LoggerUtility
Constructs a LoggerUtility.

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class Main
Main entry point of the simulation.
main(String[]) - Static method in class SyncMain
Main entry point.
Main - Class in Unnamed Package
Main application class ECTE331 project simulation loop.
MathUtility - Class in Unnamed Package
MathUtility provides a static utility method for computing the sum of integers from 0 to n using a loop structure.

P

processReadings(Integer, Integer, Integer) - Method in class DroneController
Performs majority voting on the three sensor readings, identifies faulty/corrupted/outlier sensors, tracks system reliability, and updates or falls back on the altitude.

R

readSensor(int, int) - Method in class Sensor
Reads the current simulated altitude from the sensor.
reset() - Method in class SharedVariables
Resets all shared variables back to zero.
run() - Method in class ThreadA
Executes FuncA1, FuncA2, and FuncA3 in sequence with semaphore-based synchronisation to enforce the execution dependency shown in Figure 2.1.
run() - Method in class ThreadB
Executes FuncB1, FuncB2, and FuncB3 in sequence with semaphore-based synchronisation to enforce the execution dependency shown in Figure 2.1.

S

Sensor - Class in Unnamed Package
Simulates a single physical altitude sensor on the drone.
Sensor(String) - Constructor for class Sensor
Constructs a Sensor with a specific ID.
SensorReadException - Exception Class in Unnamed Package
SensorReadException represents a simulated sensor hardware failure where a sensor is unable to produce a reading.
SensorReadException(String) - Constructor for exception class SensorReadException
Constructs a new SensorReadException with a detailed message.
SharedVariables - Class in Unnamed Package
SharedVariables holds all shared mutable state between Thread A and Thread B.
SharedVariables() - Constructor for class SharedVariables
Constructs a new SharedVariables instance with all values initialised to zero.
sumTo(int) - Static method in class MathUtility
Computes the sum of integers from 0 to n (inclusive) using a loop.
SyncMain - Class in Unnamed Package
SyncMain is the main application entry point for ECTE331 Project Part 2: Thread Synchronisation and Communication.
SystemReliabilityException - Exception Class in Unnamed Package
SystemReliabilityException is thrown when the drone navigation system's reliability thresholds are violated, forcing a transition to SAFE MODE.
SystemReliabilityException(String) - Constructor for exception class SystemReliabilityException
Constructs a new SystemReliabilityException with a detailed message.

T

ThreadA - Class in Unnamed Package
ThreadA implements the execution sequence for Thread A in the ECTE331 thread synchronisation problem.
ThreadA(SharedVariables, Semaphore, Semaphore, Semaphore, Semaphore) - Constructor for class ThreadA
Constructs ThreadA with references to all shared state and semaphores.
ThreadB - Class in Unnamed Package
ThreadB implements the execution sequence for Thread B in the ECTE331 thread synchronisation problem.
ThreadB(SharedVariables, Semaphore, Semaphore, Semaphore, Semaphore) - Constructor for class ThreadB
Constructs ThreadB with references to all shared state and semaphores.
